title: Compass Tracker
description:
a very high quality 1.20.6 manhunt datapack that doesn't use /setworlspawn
the compass supports multiple runners
body:
**This is a 100% Vanilla Manhunt Datapack**

_About:_
- This was made only by a Datapack
- This is **100% vanilla** **1.20.6**
- It supports **Multiple** Runners and Hunters at the same time and all Hunters can be Tracking different Runners.
- The way the Tracker works is very similar to the Dream's Manhunt's.
- This Datapack is a Compass that the Hunters hold and right click to track the nearest Speedrunner.

_Credits:_
- By **Sammy3D**
- Join **Openvoxel Studios** Discord Server for more Datapacks and Maps

_Crediting:_
- Make Sure to Credit me if you use this Datapack in a video or use it in any way that is not private.
- Also you can republish this datapack as long as you have modified it and credit me.

_Extra:_
- Do ``` /trigger Manhunt ```
For a Tutorial on how to use the datapack.
